channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Heat wave's deadly impact grows
item.description: Extreme heat gripping much of the U.S. has killed at least two dozen people over the past week, as about 40 million people remained under heat alerts.

item.title: Startup aims to let investors trade computing power as a commodity
item.description: Ornn, backed by Andreessen Horowitz, raised $33 million to create a marketplace for trading the computing power that powers modern technology.

item.title: Trump contacted FIFA's Infantino about Balogun's suspension
item.description: President Trump spoke with FIFA President Gianni Infantino regarding U.S. striker Folarin Balogun's controversial red card and subsequent suspension.

item.title: Democratic socialists revive Medicare for All proposals
item.description: Success in this year's primaries shows renewed support for Medicare for All among Democratic socialists and progressives, despite centrist opposition.
